channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: U.S. and Iran standoff over the Strait of Hormuz intensifies
item.description: Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the region on Wednesday in response to the U.S. maritime blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded:
Iran threatened to block all oil exporting routes in the region on Wednesday in response to the U.S. maritime blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz.

(Image credit: AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Todd Blanche faces high-stakes confirmation hearing for attorney general
item.description: Blanche won Senate confirmation early in President Trump's second term to serve as the No. 2 official at the Justice Department. Now he faces a contentious hearing as he seeks the top job.
item.content:encoded:
Blanche won Senate confirmation early in President Trump's second term to serve as the No. 2 official at the Justice Department. Now he faces a contentious hearing as he seeks the top job.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas

item.title: CDC director nominee Erica Schwartz faces Senate for confirmation hearing
item.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's nominee for CDC director, faces the Senate health committee for her confirmation hearing on July 15. If confirmed, she will lead an agency dealing with workforce and leadership shortages, and new layers of political review.
item.content:encoded:
Dr. Erica Schwartz, Trump's nominee for CDC director, faces the Senate health committee for her confirmation hearing on July 15. If confirmed, she will lead an agency dealing with workforce and leadership shortages, and new layers of political review.

(Image credit: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: Todd Blanche's confirmation brings one Epstein survivor to center stage
item.description: Dani Bensky and a group of women who were abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a bond they call a "survivor sisterhood." They live in two worlds, of advocacy and everyday life and motherhood.
item.content:encoded:
Dani Bensky and a group of women who were abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a bond they call a "survivor sisterhood." They live in two worlds, of advocacy and everyday life and motherhood.

(Image credit: Corrie Aune for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: American AI is expensive. Some startups are turning to cheap Chinese models
item.description: AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models.
item.content:encoded:
AI is a fast-growing business expense. Some companies are cutting costs by switching to cheaper Chinese AI models.

(Image credit: Imen Ben Youssef/Hans Lucas)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to appear for confirmation hearing, U.S. restarts blockade against Iran amid standoff over the Strait of Hormuz, ICE suspends traffic stops after deadly shootings.
item.content:encoded: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to appear for confirmation hearing, U.S. restarts blockade against Iran amid standoff over the Strait of Hormuz, ICE suspends traffic stops after deadly shootings.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Mystery bidder buys T. rex nicknamed 'Gus' for a record $50 million
item.description: A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest and most complete specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million Tuesday to a mystery bidder.
item.content:encoded:
A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest and most complete specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million Tuesday to a mystery bidder.

(Image credit: Matthew Sherman/Sotheby's via AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump will speak on elections in Thursday primetime address
item.description: The speech comes as President Trump has escalated calls for Republicans to pass tighter federal voting rules for November's midterm elections.
item.content:encoded:
The speech comes as President Trump has escalated calls for Republicans to pass tighter federal voting rules for November's midterm elections.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Ebola is spreading faster in eastern Congo than it can be tracked, as deaths pass 700
item.description: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track.
item.content:encoded:
Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track.

(Image credit: Dirole Lotsima Dieudonne)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Supreme Court Justices give chilling accounts of threats to their safety
item.description: Supreme Court Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett spoke with lawmakers about funding for security and other needs for the court on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded:
Supreme Court Justices Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett spoke with lawmakers about funding for security and other needs for the court on Tuesday.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg
